'''Tandres''' was an [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Tandres was present at a ceremony near the [[Kuat system/Legends|Kuat system]] where [[Executor/Legends|''Executor'']] was officially commissioned.

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|12|Galaxywide NewsNets}} {{1st}}
